heading: Short title
label: 4211 Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Civil Liberties Act of 1988”.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 1989b of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

Short Title of 1992 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–371, § 1106 Stat. 1167Sept. 27, 1992“This Act [see Tables for classification] may be cited as the ‘Civil Liberties Act Amendments of 1992’.”
